200MA Level.significance: Key support/resistance for 8MA. 8MA crossing below is an early warning of deterioration, not a standalone bearish signal.

Extreme Weakness (0.40).significance: 8MA below 0.40 marks extreme weakness. Historically, troughs at this level precede significant rallies.

Healthy Threshold (0.60).significance: 8MA above 0.60 indicates broad participation. Below 0.60 = selective market, above = inclusive rally.

Historical Avg Peak.significance: Average peak level. Approaching this level suggests breadth may be near a cyclical high.

Historical Avg Trough.significance: Average extreme trough level. Reaching this level is a potential contrarian buy signal.

news.headline: Iran declares Strait of Hormuz open to shipping; Trump says U.S. blockade still active
news.headline_zh: 伊朗宣布霍爾木茲海峽對商船開放；川普稱美軍封鎖仍全面生效
news.bull_case: 停火維繫+伊朗開放 → 油價持續回落 $80，風險性資產續漲，航空/消費/工業受益；歷史類比 1990 波斯灣戰爭停火後 WTI 腰斬 50%、S&P 反彈 20%。
news.bear_case: Trump 明言封鎖『繼續全面執行直到和平協議簽署』與伊朗宣布嚴重矛盾，代表停火仍脆弱；若 48-72h 內封鎖再收緊或船隻遭阻，油價可能 V 型反彈回 $100+，今日 Dow +1000 將全數回吐。
news.sector_view: 油價 -10% 對 Energy/XLE/XOM/CVX 短線壓力（今日 Dow/Lyondell 已領跌化工）；Airlines（UAL/DAL/AAL）、Consumer Discretionary（CCL/RCL/Cruise）、Industrials 航運（FDX/UPS）受益；方向依封鎖實際狀態而定，48h 內不明朗。
news.macro_view: 油價回落 → 夏季 CPI 尾部風險淡化 → Fed 6 月降息機率上修；USD 已因戰爭升值，若封鎖解除將回吐；10yr 殖利率 48h 內可下行 15-20bp。關鍵：下週 Trump 與伊朗外長會談結果。
news.arbiter_reasoning: 四方分歧大（+4/-4/+1/+3；max-min=8 → 強制 BINARY）。核心衝突：Iran 表態 vs Trump 表態完全矛盾，48h 內的政策決定是唯一裁決標準。加權後 +0.8 中性偏多，但因為 binary_flag 且 within_48h，依仲裁規則所有受影響產業降一個 verdict 等級，最終標記 BINARY。
news.debate_note: 若下週 Trump 正式解除封鎖 → verdict 升為 BULLISH +3；若封鎖再收緊 → verdict 降為 BEARISH -3。binary swing 幅度 6 分。

news.headline: TSMC first-quarter profit rises 58%, beats estimates as AI demand fuels record run
news.headline_zh: 台積電 Q1 利潤 +58% 超預期，AI 需求推動第八季連續雙位數成長
news.bull_case: 淨利 NT$572.5B（$18.2B）+58% YoY，先進製程佔晶圓營收 75%，FY2026 revenue guide 上修至 >+30% YoY，Q2 指引 $39-40.2B（QoQ +10%），capex 上調至 $52-56B 上緣；CEO 稱『AI 需求極度穩健』；8 連季雙位數成長，多年 AI 成長週期獲供應端最權威確認。受益鏈廣：TSM / NVDA / AVGO / AMD / ASML / AMAT / KLAC / LRCX。
news.bear_case: Capex 上緣 = 折舊升高、先進製程設備邊際報酬遞減；營收集中於 NVDA 客戶（>25%）帶來單一客戶風險；台海地緣政治長尾；中國出口管制未解除。屬於結構性尾部風險，非對本次財報的異議。
news.sector_view: Semi & Semi-equip 強力正向；可將 theme-detector 中『AI & Semiconductors』從 Exhausting 重新提升至 Trending；SMH/SOXX 下週可期望測試新高；Custom ASIC 供應鏈（AVGO/MRVL/VRT/CLS）同步受益。Tickers: TSM, NVDA, AVGO, ASML, AMAT, KLAC, LRCX, AMD, MRVL。
news.macro_view: 對 Fed 路徑影響中性（非通膨驅動）；美國科技出口/IP 需求強，支撐 USD；Taiwan 外資流入加速；不改變利率預期。歷史類比：1999 年末 TSM 爆發性財報預告網路泡沫高峰前的半導體景氣頂，但本輪 AI 真實 capex 可驗證，風險模式不同。
news.arbiter_reasoning: Sector 40% 權重（news_type=earnings, 但此則屬 sector bellwether 故採 earnings 表的 sector 40%）：0.25*5 + 0.25*(-1) + 0.40*5 + 0.10*1.5 = +2.9 → BULLISH。Bull/Bear 差距 6 分超過 BINARY 門檻，但 Bear 論據為長期結構性尾部風險而非對本財報的根本異議，四方方向性一致偏多，故採 BULLISH 而非 BINARY（已在 arbiter_reasoning 說明此例外）。
news.debate_note: Bear 論點屬長尾風險非盈餘異議；Sector/Bull 評估一致。若 NVDA 下週 5/14 財報同樣 beat+raise，AI theme 可重新進入 Accelerating。

news.headline: Netflix stock sinks after streamer reiterates guidance, says Reed Hastings to exit board
news.headline_zh: Netflix 股價下跌：Q1 指引僅維持未上修，Reed Hastings 宣布退出董事會
news.bull_case: Q1 revenue 超預期；EPS 大幅跳升（受惠 WBD 合約終止費）；Ted Sarandos 喊建構 M&A muscle 代表成長路徑擴張；廣告層與密碼分享追繳仍在產出高毛利訂戶增量。中長期敘事未破。
news.bear_case: Buy-side 對 earnings 唯一真正要的『raise』缺席，指引僅重申；Reed Hastings 退出董事會 = 創辦人完全離席，象徵性負面訊號；盤後 stock sinks（股價已給出 verdict）；WBD 終止費屬一次性，扣除後 EPS 成長溫和。Comm Svcs 權重最大單檔 $NFLX 拖累 XLC。
news.sector_view: Communication Services 負向；擴散至串流同業 DIS / PARA / WBD 的 M&A 敘事同步被推翻；廣告週期溫和保護 GOOGL 尚可。對 Tech 整體溢出效應低，SMH 不受影響。Tickers: NFLX, DIS, PARA, WBD, GOOGL, XLC。
news.macro_view: 無直接 Fed 或宏觀指標影響；可視為『mega-cap 頂部成長飽和』的微型案例，加入高估值個股的基本面注意清單；對市場 RSI 96.9 過熱的技術警示微加權。
news.arbiter_reasoning: 0.25*2 + 0.25*(-3) + 0.40*(-2) + 0.10*0 = +0.5 - 0.75 - 0.8 + 0 = -1.05 → BEARISH。關鍵在 Sector Analyst 評分 -2 + 40% 權重主導結論。Hastings 退出董事會為敘事性負面，加重 bear 信心至 0.7。
news.debate_note: Bull 與 Bear 對 EPS 數字解釋分歧：Bull 看 absolute beat，Bear 看 ex-one-off growth。盤後價格已決定方向。

news.headline: Nvidia AI chip rivals attract record funding as competition heats up
news.headline_zh: Nvidia 的 AI 晶片對手吸引破紀錄資金，競爭升溫
news.bull_case: 資金湧入挑戰者代表 AI chip 總潛在市場（TAM）巨大；ecosystem 擴張有利於 cloud 運算紅利；custom ASIC 成熟市場常態，NVDA 供應商（TSM/ASML）仍受益於整體晶圓需求擴大。
news.bear_case: Euclyd、Fractile 等歐洲 ASIC 挑戰者融資規模創高，多年期對 NVDA 90% 市佔是結構性壓力；inference 市場最易被專用晶片切分，NVDA 訓練端壟斷地位不等於推論端；narrative chink 可能在未來 2-4 季壓縮多頭倍數。
news.sector_view: 近期無實質影響（挑戰者距量產 2-4 年）；NVDA CUDA 護城河穩固；但 AI chip 競爭敘事對中長期 NVDA 溢價構成壓力。週期性利多 AVGO / MRVL（自有 ASIC 生態），中性至微負向 NVDA。Tickers: NVDA, AVGO, MRVL, TSM。
news.macro_view: 歐盟科技融資活躍為歐洲 AI 自主性策略的延伸；對美國科技出口政策無直接衝擊；對 USD / rates 中性。
news.arbiter_reasoning: 0.20*1 + 0.20*(-2) + 0.50*(-1) + 0.10*0 = -0.7，|score| 接近 1 門檻，標記 NEUTRAL（輕微偏空）。Sector 50% 權重下 NVDA 短期影響有限但敘事風險不容忽視。
news.debate_note: Bull/Bear 時間軸分歧：Bull 看 2-4 年，Bear 看 2-4 季 narrative。Sector 短期中性為主。

news.headline: Think the rally is safe? This elite market-timing indicator says a correction is overdue (gold-platinum ratio)
news.headline_zh: 黃金/鉑金比處歷史極端，頂級市場擇時指標警告修正已過期
news.bull_case: 單一指標不應作為進出場依據；SPX 動能強、breadth 略有改善、企業盈餘第 6 連季雙位數、FTD 100 分、AI 資本週期驗證 → TINA 敘事仍強；歷史上此指標有 18 個月不準先例。
news.bear_case: Gold/Platinum ratio 處歷史極端，過去 4 次（2000 / 2008 / 2015 / 2020）皆先行 3-6 個月對應 10-20% 修正；搭配 SPY RSI 96.9 極度超買、F&G 69 Greed、Utilities/Materials overbought_risk=HIGH → 情緒 + 技術 + 指標三重過熱警示。
news.sector_view: 若修正來臨，首當其衝 = phase1 中 overbought_risk=HIGH 的 Utilities / Materials / Industrials；次受影響 = 小型股 Russell 2000（IWM 3 月以來最強），Tech 賣壓多頭 long 獲利平倉。Tickers: XLU, XLB, XLI, IWM, SPY。
news.macro_view: Gold/Platinum divergence 暗示『恐慌資產』（Gold）相對『工業資產』（Platinum）極度偏愛 → 代表即使市場創高，機構資金已在 shift 避險；宏觀含義：系統性風險溢價被壓縮但未消失，可能在下一個催化劑（FOMC 4/28-29、CPI）釋放。
news.arbiter_reasoning: 0.30*1 + 0.30*(-3) + 0.15*(-1) + 0.25*(-2) = +0.3 - 0.9 - 0.15 - 0.5 = -1.25 → BEARISH（情緒型）。不構成立即撤退訊號，但支持降低新倉位、提高 trailing stop、避開 overbought 產業。
news.debate_note: Bull 提及指標有過長期延遲先例；Bear 關注本次搭配多重過熱指標疊加。分歧在於時效性，非方向性。

news.headline: TSMC Q1 profit surges 58%, AI demand 'extremely robust', raises FY26 guidance
news.headline_zh: 台積電 Q1 利潤飆升 58%，AI 需求「極度強勁」，上修全年展望
news.bull_case: Q1 revenue $35.6B (+35%), GM 66.2% 超預期。Q2 guidance $39-40.2B 遠超共識。CEO 稱 AI 需求 extremely robust。Capex 推至 $52-56B 上緣。FY26 上修 >30% — semi cycle 核心引擎確認。
news.bear_case: 高基期連續 beat 預期值只會更高。中國地緣風險可能影響先進製程客戶 order 節奏。Capex 推高→FY27 折舊壓力。股價已反映 >30% 成長。
news.sector_view: Semi 全面受益：NVDA/AVGO/ARM/AMAT/LRCX。Cloud infra 間接利多。TSMC capex 確認 EUV 需求中長期無虞。
news.macro_view: Fed 路徑中性 — AI capex 非消費通膨驅動。但全球半導體資本支出佔比持續提升，需監控工業通膨。
news.arbiter_reasoning: earnings 類型 Sector 權重 40%，三連擊 (beat+raise+raise capex) 的 conviction 極高。Bear 高基期警告有效但不改變方向。向上調整至 +3.5。
news.debate_note: Bull vs Bear 核心分歧：高基期是否已被 price in。Sector 一致看多。

news.headline: Trump threatens to fire Powell by May 15 if he stays on Fed board
news.headline_zh: 川普威脅若 Powell 5/15 後仍在任將予以解僱
news.bull_case: 第三次威脅，市場已鈍化。Powell 任期本就到期。法律上無法 for-cause 解僱。鴿派接替→降息加速。
news.bear_case: May 15 期限是新的，搭配 DOJ 調查構成合理懷疑。Fed 獨立性受質疑→長端殖利率上行、USD 走弱、Gold 飆。1971 Burns 類比。
news.sector_view: Gold miners +strong（避險）、Financials -moderate（NIM 不確定性）、Long-duration Tech -weak。tickers: GLD, GDX, TLT, XLF
news.macro_view: 制度性風險。若 Powell 被換→政治化降息→美元信用溢酬跳升。Steepener trade（短降長升）。2018 類似威脅 VIX +40% 但 2 週回落。
news.arbiter_reasoning: monetary_policy 權重 Macro 50%。制度風險 vs 鈍化效應。May 15 deadline 是新催化劑但尚有 29 天緩衝。-2.7 配 binary flag。
news.debate_note: Bull 認為噪音，Bear+Macro 認為制度風險。歷史偏向制度最終撐住但短線波動。

news.headline: ASML stock sinks 5% on China restrictions despite beating Q1 estimates, raising guidance
news.headline_zh: ASML 股價下跌 5%，中國限制令蓋過超預期財報與上修展望
news.bull_case: 營收 €8.8B beat，利潤 €2.8B beat，FY26 上修至 €36-40B。EUV 壟斷不變，TSMC capex 確認長期設備需求。
news.bear_case: 市場已忽略 beat。China 營收 36%→19% 驟降，DUV 禁令若通過→<10%。Q2 guidance 略低共識。Sell the beat。
news.sector_view: Semi-equip -strong（ASML 為 bellwether 拖累 sentiment）。LRCX/AMAT/KLAC 被波及。短線情緒 vs 中線基本面分歧。
news.macro_view: 地緣科技戰第二波 — DUV 禁令是繼 EUV 後的 technology decoupling 升級。Supply chain 碎片化成本 +3-5%。
news.arbiter_reasoning: earnings 類型 Sector 40%。雖然 beat+raise，但 market voted -5%。China revenue cliff + DUV 政策風險 > 短期 beat。-1.7。
news.debate_note: Bull 看基本面，Bear 看政策。市場站在 Bear 那邊（price action 確認）。

news.headline: Hormuz blockade 'fully implemented', White House signals diplomatic off-ramp, ceasefire expires Apr 21
news.headline_zh: 荷莫茲海峽封鎖「全面實施」，白宮釋放外交出口訊號，停火 4/21 到期
news.bull_case: 最大壓力已施加，Vance/Witkoff/Kushner 積極斡旋（21hr 馬拉松）。若停火延長→油價 -10-15%→通膨壓力驟降→consumer/airlines 利多。Trump 有動力在 100 天前達成 deal。
news.bear_case: 伊朗被逼到牆角（$435M/day 損失）→絕望對手更危險。4/21 ceasefire 到期若未達成→衝突急劇升級。Shipping disruption 即使停火也需數月恢復。
news.sector_view: 停火→Airlines/Cruise +strong, Energy -moderate。破裂→完全相反。tickers: DAL, UAL, CCL, XLE, USO
news.macro_view: 4/21 是最關鍵催化劑。停火→支撐 Fed on hold；破裂→Hammack hike scenario 變 base case。Binary 但偏正面（外交團隊有動力）。
news.arbiter_reasoning: geopolitical Macro 40%。加權計算 +1.2 但 4/21 deadline 5 天內→標記 BINARY。方向偏 bullish 但結果高度不確定。
news.debate_note: Bull vs Bear 完全取決於 4/21 ceasefire 延長與否。Macro expert 認為偏正面但拒絕給 conviction。

news.headline: Fed cluster: Williams lowers GDP forecast, Hammack floats rate hike if inflation stays high
news.headline_zh: Fed 信號匯總：Williams 下修 GDP，Hammack 不排除升息
news.bull_case: Williams 看到通膨正面訊號。Rates on hold = 確定性。若 Iran 停火→能源通膨消退→H2 降息空間。
news.bear_case: Williams 下修 GDP 至 2-2.5%。Hammack 首次公開提 hike 可能（通膨 3.5% in April）。滯膨風險不再是假設。
news.sector_view: Rates on hold → REITs 中性。Hike 風險↑ → Utilities 承壓（疊加 OB）。Financials NIM 短期受益 steeper curve。
news.macro_view: Hold as baseline + hike as tail + growth downgrade = stagflationary mix。Iran 停火是解鎖鍵：停火→溫和通膨；持續→hike 變 base case。
news.arbiter_reasoning: monetary_policy Macro 50%。Fed 偏鷹但 conditional on Iran。-1.4 反映 stagflation 風險上升但尚非 base case。
news.debate_note: Bull vs Bear 核心分歧：Iran 停火是否能及時消除通膨壓力。Macro 給出 conditional 判斷。

news.headline: Iran-US ceasefire fragile; Hormuz blockade partially active as Vance prepares 2nd round talks
news.bull_case: Talks resuming in 2 days per Trump, market pricing in de-escalation (oil already +3% but off highs)
news.bear_case: Ceasefire violated both sides, Lebanon conflict separate, Hormuz blockade unresolved, oil volatility structural until June 2027 capacity concern
news.arbiter_reasoning: Neither side committed, but negotiation channel open. Binary event pending. Market best positioned with DEFENSE overweight + ENERGY neutral.
news.debate_note: 2-week ceasefire began 4/8 → expires ~4/22. Decision window is THIS week.

news.headline: TSMC Q1 2026 earnings Thursday 4/16: expects $35.47B revenue, $3.26 EPS, 59% gross margin
news.headline_zh: 台積電 Q1 2026 財報 4/16 公布，預估營收 $35.47B、EPS $3.26、毛利率 59%
news.bull_case: AI chip demand holds through Middle East conflict; premium 3nm pricing pushes GM > 59%; long-term GM target likely raised above 58%; Qualcomm/MediaTek capacity filled with AI
news.bear_case: Margin peak warning from Wall Street; smartphone/PC outlook uncertain; Middle East supply chain disruption risk (shipping)
news.arbiter_reasoning: 4/16 is 1-day binary with high historical beat rate. Positive classification. TSM BUY thesis validated by guide-raise expectation.
news.debate_note: NVDA, AMD, AVGO all downstream of TSMC — any beat also lifts semi sector broadly

news.headline: NVIDIA Blackwell ramp delivers $0.5T visibility through 2026; hyperscalers deploying 1,000 NVL72 racks/week
news.headline_zh: NVDA Blackwell 量產至 2026 年底可視能見度 $0.5T，雲端巨頭每週部署 1,000 個 NVL72 機櫃
news.bull_case: 72,000 Blackwell GPUs/week hyperscaler deployment, $500B backlog through Dec 2026, Rubin next-gen locked
news.bear_case: China AI chip export deal (15% rev to US gov) caps upside; 25% Section 232 semi tariff effective Jan 2026
news.arbiter_reasoning: NVDA bull case fundamentally intact. Blackwell demand not the question — supply chain execution is the only risk.
news.debate_note: NVDA Q1 FY27 earnings ~late May; visibility extended to end 2026 significantly reduces quarter-by-quarter risk

news.headline: FOMC 4/28-29 meeting: markets price 85% hold at 3.50-3.75%, no dot plot this meeting
news.headline_zh: FOMC 4/28-29 會議：市場定價 85% 維持 3.50-3.75%，本次無 dot plot
news.bull_case: Hold provides rate certainty; if Powell hints June cut → risk-on rally
news.bear_case: Inflation still above 2% target, 'progress stalled' language, Iran conflict + oil could delay cuts further to July+
news.arbiter_reasoning: Language is the event, not the decision. Watch for 'patience' vs 'data-dependent' phrasing. Positioning BEFORE 4/29 risky due to reaction asymmetry.
news.debate_note: Non-SEP meeting historically causes lower vol reaction than SEP meetings; June 16-17 is next SEP where actual cut telegraphed

news.headline: Q1 2026 earnings season kicks off with 12.6% expected profit growth — 6th consecutive double-digit quarter
news.headline_zh: Q1 2026 財報季開跑，預估獲利成長 12.6%，連 6 季雙位數成長
news.bull_case: 6 consecutive strong quarters, bull momentum resilient to geopolitical noise
news.bear_case: Goldman's stock drop on FICC miss shows how high the bar is; any disappointment punished
news.arbiter_reasoning: Earnings season is an alpha generator but amplifies dispersion. Pre-earnings positioning risky, post-earnings reaction is the edge.
news.debate_note: Banks start Monday; TSM Thursday; NFLX / Tesla / AMD next week; NVDA late May

news.headline: US-China semiconductor tariff peace extended to Nov 10, 2026; next hike deferred to June 2027
news.headline_zh: 美中半導體關稅停戰延長至 2026 年 11 月 10 日，下次調升延至 2027 年 6 月
news.bull_case: 18 months of tariff stability for semi supply chain; NVDA/AMD keep 15% revenue deal stable
news.bear_case: Section 232 25% still active for specified chip imports since Jan 2026; 15% NVDA/AMD 'revenue tax' ongoing
news.arbiter_reasoning: Near-term tail risk removed; structural 15% rev tax + 25% Section 232 remain as persistent drag.
news.debate_note: Removes June 2026 tariff cliff from binary risks list — positive for 2026 semi earnings

news.headline: Goldman Sachs Q1 beats EPS but FICC misses; stock -3% pre-market
news.headline_zh: 高盛 Q1 EPS 超預期但 FICC 收入不如預期，盤前跌 3%
news.bull_case: M&A and equity trading strong, underlying franchise intact
news.bear_case: FICC weakness = fixed income trading slump = concerning for JPM/MS peer reads; sets cautious tone for bank season
news.arbiter_reasoning: Single-company issue but sector tone-setter. Watch JPM / MS for read-through.
news.debate_note: Banking sector already WARM in sector scan; this reinforces COLD thesis on investment banks

news.headline: Dollar Index (DXY) approaches 99 on oil rise + Fed hold expectations
news.headline_zh: 美元指數逼近 99，油價上升 + Fed 維持利率預期推動
news.bull_case: Strong dollar is anti-inflationary at margin
news.bear_case: FX translation drag for mega caps; EM currency pressure; commodity deflation
news.arbiter_reasoning: Secondary effect, not a direct driver. Watch if DXY breaks 100 (psychological).
news.debate_note: DXY < 99 = mild headwind, > 100 would be material

news.headline: S&P 500 approaches all-time high 7,002 as Nasdaq +1.96%, Dow +0.66%
news.headline_zh: S&P 500 逼近歷史新高 7,002，Nasdaq +1.96% 科技領漲
news.bull_case: S&P 500 within 0.3% of all-time high 7002.28; Nasdaq +2% shows AI trade intact; bank earnings season kicks off
news.bear_case: Near-ATH entries = poor RR; any shock = big downside; breadth 36.8 still weakening warns of narrow leadership
news.arbiter_reasoning: Momentum real but RR degraded near ATH. Chase trades dangerous. Focus on individual oversold names (PLTR type).

news.headline: ASML Q1 earnings beat on intense AI demand — strong read-through for TSMC tomorrow
news.headline_zh: ASML Q1 財報超預期，AI 需求強勁 — 利多 TSM 明日財報
news.bull_case: ASML 's strong Q1 validates AI capex super-cycle; N2 ramp at TSMC supported; bullish TSM 4/16 print
news.bear_case: None material — ASML is the cleanest tell on semi equipment demand
news.arbiter_reasoning: This is a POSITIVE leading indicator for TSM tomorrow. Reinforces TSM BUY thesis from V4.6 analysis.
news.debate_note: Read-through strength: ASML > TSMC > NVDA/AMD/AVGO in the AI capex chain

news.headline: Trump: Iran war 'close to over', 2nd round of talks in Pakistan within days; ceasefire expires 4/21
news.headline_zh: 川普：伊朗戰爭「接近結束」，巴基斯坦第二輪談判即將舉行，停火期 4/21 到期
news.bull_case: Trump 'close to over' comment + Iran offering safe passage = bull de-escalation path; oil should retreat on confirmation
news.bear_case: Nuclear sticking point (US wants 20yr halt, Iran wants 3-5yr); US military still blockading; ceasefire expires in 6 days
news.arbiter_reasoning: Shift from 4/14 binary concern → 4/15 mild positive bias. Still binary but weighted toward de-escalation.
news.debate_note: Ceasefire 4/21 expiration window is THE event; binary decision next week

news.headline: Treasury Sec Bessent: Fed can wait on cuts until Iran oil impact clearer
news.headline_zh: 財長 Bessent：Fed 可等待 Iran 油價衝擊明朗後再降息
news.bull_case: Bessent still expects inflation to moderate; rate cuts delayed, not cancelled
news.bear_case: Treasury-Fed coordination signals patience; 2026 only 1 cut expected; Iran + oil keeps core PCE elevated 2.7%
news.arbiter_reasoning: Reduces probability of June cut. Yield curve to stay high. Long-duration assets (REITs/growth) mild headwind.
news.debate_note: Fed March 2026: 1 cut for year maintained; core PCE revised up to 2.7% (was 2.5%)
